# Tree-PLV external code note

- **Canonical title:** Advancing Process Verification for Large Language Models via Tree-Based Preference Learning

- **Official publication page:** https://aclanthology.org/2024.emnlp-main.125/
- **Venue / year:** EMNLP 2024 (confirmed on ACL Anthology page)
- **Official code link:** No clearly identified official public Git repository was confirmed.
- **Additional artifact observed:** ACL Anthology lists a `Software` attachment (`.software.zip`) on the paper page.
- **License:** Unclear from checked public metadata/pages.
- **Import status:** Code not imported.
- **Reason:** No clearly official public code repository with explicit licensing was confirmed; importing attached code artifacts without clear license terms is legally unclear.
